audit_source: autonomous_audit_2026-06-22T02-05-51Z.md (Run 119) — most recent audit by filename date

new_rules_added: TOD_MORNING_EDGE_DEACTIVATION (conf=88, gate=20) — tod_morning_edge_v1 conflicts with live data: morning WR=28% vs claimed 71%. Underlying insight invalidated at 96% conf.
fixes_skipped: HYPE_SHORT_VETO_SPLIT: 71% conf, below 75% threshold. 10th consecutive flag. AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL.
RR_GEOMETRY_FIX: parameter ambiguity (atr_mult_sl 1.0 vs 2.0 conflict). Deferred.
BOT_RESTART: human action required (61st consecutive flag).

execution_forensics.note: trades.csv absent — bot offline 74 days. Forensics derived from 100d backtest audit data.

noise_stop_analysis.description: 50.8% of SL hits where conf>75 occurred in illiquid/unknown/ranging regime

output.primary_swap: regime_agent haiku→sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT events (+$0.27/mo cost, ~$186/mo benefit from better regime transition detection)

high_priority_findings.finding: BOT OFFLINE DAY 74 — 61st consecutive P0 flag. Zero live revenue. All 5 feedback loops frozen. No live data for 74 days.
NEGATIVE KELLY EDGE: Kelly=-0.167. WR=44.5% vs 52.4% needed. Every 100 trades = -$1,384 expected loss. Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27. 269 SL hits drain $29,300; TP events recover only $21,164.
high_priority_findings.action: HYPE_SL_ATR_WIDEN dev fix — widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR, set TP1 to maintain >=2.0 R:R. Deferred due to atr_mult_sl parameter ambiguity (1.0 in rules vs 2.0 in SymbolProfile).

high_priority_findings.finding: HYPE_SHORT_VETO_SPLIT AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL (10 runs). HYPE SHORT <75% conf has +$808 positive EV in 100d (+$10.09/trade avg, n=80). Blanket veto blocks profitable sub-condition. Real problem is HYPE SHORT >=75% conf (-$70.06/trade, n=77).
high_priority_findings.action: Human action required: Review and approve split of hype_short_veto_v1 into hype_short_highconf_veto_v1 (>=75%) and hype_short_lowconf_probe_v1 (<75%, 50% size).

high_priority_findings.finding: TOD_MORNING_EDGE_DEACTIVATION applied this run (conf=88). tod_morning_edge_v1 (confidence boost 6-12 UTC) was active despite underlying insight being invalidated at 96% confidence. Live morning WR=28% on 18 trades, not 71% as claimed.
high_priority_findings.action: Verify tod_morning_edge_v1 set to active=false in graduated_rules.json. Rule-insight lifecycle coupling is broken — when insights are invalidated, rules must be auto-flagged.

high_priority_findings.finding: CONFIDENCE MODEL DEGRADED: 80-90% conf = 40.0% WR (worst tier in 100d). 90%+ = 40.5%. Inverse confidence-performance correlation — each confidence step up predicts ~4pp WR degradation. confidence_paradox_sizing_v1 covers 85-90% only; 80-85% and 90%+ unaddressed.
high_priority_findings.action: Expand confidence_paradox_sizing_v1 scope to 80-100% range. CONF_70_80_DEGRADATION_PROBE (gate_20) active from Run 127.

high_priority_findings.finding: HYPE LOSS DOMINANCE: 68% of losses from HYPE (-$5,563 of -$8,173 in 100d). HYPE SHORT SLs specifically: 69 hits x -$221.92 = -$15,312 (52% of all SL losses). 71.4% partial fill rate on entry adds execution slippage.
high_priority_findings.action: HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE (gate_20, 0.75x) active from Run 127. Monitor 20-trade sample for WR change.

high_priority_findings.finding: SHORT_DIRECTION_VETO_INVERSION: short_direction_veto_v1 actively blocks the better-performing side. SHORT 46.4% WR vs LONG 39.5% WR in 100d (6.9pp gap). SHORT generates $3,178 more PnL on equal trade counts.
high_priority_findings.action: SHORT_DIRECTION_VETO_INVERSION probe (gate_20) active from Run 127. Deactivate veto if SHORT >= LONG WR on n>=30 live trades.

high_priority_findings.finding: REGIME_AGENT UPGRADE OPPORTUNITY: haiku regime agent misses trending/illiquid transitions worth $62/trade avg loss. Upgrading to sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT events costs $0.27/mo, saves estimated $186/mo (688x ROI multiple). Implementation: add REGIME_SHIFT to MEDIUM_VALUE_TRIGGERS in usage_tiers.py.
high_priority_findings.action: Add AGENT_REGIME_SHIFT_MODEL=sonnet override to usage_tiers.py trigger routing.

high_priority_findings.finding: NOISE STOP EPIDEMIC: 50.8% of conf>75 SL hits occurred in illiquid/unknown/ranging regime — regime gate should prevent these entries but is not catching all cases. 136 estimated noise SL hits = -$14,814 recoverable.
high_priority_findings.action: Audit regime gate logic in signal_pipeline.py — verify illiquid/unknown regime blocks are applied before position sizing, not after.

new_findings: TOD_MORNING_EDGE_DEACTIVATION applied — rule-insight lifecycle consistency gap resolved for this instance
Model optimization ROI estimate updated: regime_agent haiku→sonnet = 688x cost multiple
